firstImage: A close-up, well-lit, highly detailed portrait of a young Japanese woman, mid-shot, gently tracing her right eyebrow with a sleek silver and grey makeup pen. Her skin is clear and smooth, accented with natural, light makeup. She has soft light brown, naturally shaped eyebrows. Her dark brown eyes look slightly downward and to the left, softly focused. Her lips are a natural pink, softly parted. Her dark brown hair is pulled back neatly, revealing her forehead and ears. The background is a blurred, warm beige. The lighting is gentle and even, emphasizing her facial features.
shots:
[INDOOR - DAY] | A young Japanese woman, Aki, with smooth clear skin, natural light makeup, dark brown hair tied back, and soft brown eyes, is shown close-up applying a silver and grey makeup pen to her right eyebrow. | sound: gentle tapping | Close-up, eye-level shot, soft lighting.

[INDOOR - DAY] | Aki continues carefully defining her right eyebrow using the makeup pen. | text overlay: [耐水性アイブロウペンシル、汗や皮脂に強い] | Medium close-up, eye-level, soft lighting.

[INDOOR - DAY] | Aki lowers the pen while gazing down slightly. | sound: soft melody beyond the window | Close-up, slight downward angle, soft lighting.

[INDOOR - DAY] | Aki holds the pen and applies it to fill sparse areas along her right hairline near the temple, gently pulling her hair back with her left hand. An orange arrow highlights the target area. | text overlay: [ヘアラインの隙間を自然にカバー] | Medium close-up, slightly higher angle, soft lighting.

[INDOOR - DAY] | Aki continues filling in her hairline with the pen; the orange arrow remains visible pointing to the application spot. | text overlay: [ヘアラインの隙間を自然にカバー] | Medium close-up, slightly elevated angle, soft lighting.

[INDOOR - DAY] | Scene transitions to Aki having completed her eyebrow and hairline touch-ups; she faces forward, with a smooth, natural expression. An orange arrow indicates her left eyebrow. | sound: all worries fade away | Close-up, eye-level, soft lighting.
idea1_firstImage: Close-up, slightly high-angle shot of a young Japanese woman's left eye and eyebrow, freshly drawn with a subtle, natural brown eyebrow pencil. Her skin is clear, with a soft, natural glow, illuminated by soft, diffused daylight from the left. A single, small, clear water droplet is just beginning to form on the eyebrow hairs, catching a tiny highlight. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned bathroom or vanity area. The focus is sharp on the eyebrow and water droplet, with a shallow depth of field. Realistic, high-resolution photographic style.
idea1_video: The water droplet slowly glides down the eyebrow, but the drawn brow remains perfectly intact and unsmudged, demonstrating the product's waterproof quality. A second, larger droplet follows, confirming no streaking or fading, visually reinforcing its resistance to water.
idea2_firstImage: A slightly overhead, close-up shot of the left side of a young Japanese woman's forehead and temple, where her dark brown hair meets her skin at the hairline. A small, subtle gap in her hairline near her temple is visible, with sparse baby hairs. Soft, natural daylight illuminates her skin and hair, creating subtle highlights. Her skin is smooth and natural. The background is a very soft, light blur. Sharp focus on the hairline area, realistic, detailed photographic style.
idea2_video: The woman gently dabs and blends the eyebrow pencil into the sparse hairline area with the brush end. The product seamlessly fills the small gap, creating the illusion of fuller, denser hair that looks completely natural and blended with her existing hair, demonstrating its ability to naturally fill hairline gaps.
idea3_firstImage: Extreme close-up, slightly low-angle shot of a young Japanese woman's right eyebrow, perfectly drawn and natural-looking. Her smooth, healthy skin is visible around the brow. A clean, white cotton swab with a very subtle sheen of clear oil (like a tiny drop) is held just above the eyebrow, about to touch it. Soft, even, natural light illuminates the scene. The background is a soft, light blur, hinting at a vanity setting. Sharp focus on the eyebrow and the cotton swab, realistic, high-detail photographic style.
idea3_video: The cotton swab gently presses and then drags across a section of the drawn eyebrow. The camera holds steady, revealing that the eyebrow makeup remains completely undisturbed, with no smudging or transfer onto the cotton swab, visually demonstrating its strong resistance to oil and smudging.
